allow: PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $dst="$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\google-cloud-sdk.zip"; $url="https://dl.google.com/dl/cloudsdk/channels/rapid/google-cloud-cli-windows-x86_64.zip"; "Downloading Google Cloud CLI \(~160MB\)..."; $sw=[Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew\(\); \(New-Object Net.WebClient\).DownloadFile\($url,$dst\); "Downloaded in $\([int]$sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds\)s, size $\([int]\(\(Get-Item $dst\).Length/1MB\)\)MB")
